# Mangopay docs

> Product guides and API reference for Mangopay's wallet-first payment infrastructure

## Docs

- [The API Response object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/api-responses/api-response-object.md)
- [View an API Response](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/api-responses/view-api-response.md)
- [The Apple Pay PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/apple-pay/apple-pay-payin-object.md)
- [Create an Apple Pay PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/apple-pay/create-apple-pay-payin.md)
- [View a PayIn (Apple Pay)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/apple-pay/view-payin-apple-pay.md)
- [The Bancontact PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bancontact/bancontact-payin-object.md)
- [Create a Bancontact PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bancontact/create-bancontact-payin.md)
- [View a PayIn (Bancontact)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bancontact/view-payin-bancontact.md)
- [The Bank Account object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-accounts/bank-account-object.md)
- [Create a CA Bank Account](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-accounts/create-ca-bank-account.md)
- [Create a GB Bank Account](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-accounts/create-gb-bank-account.md)
- [Create an IBAN Bank Account](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-accounts/create-iban-bank-account.md)
- [Create an OTHER Bank Account](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-accounts/create-other-bank-account.md)
- [Create a US Bank Account](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-accounts/create-us-bank-account.md)
- [Deactivate a Bank Account](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-accounts/deactivate-bank-account.md)
- [List Bank Accounts for a User](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-accounts/list-bank-accounts-user.md)
- [View a Bank Account](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-accounts/view-bank-account.md)
- [The Bank Wire PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-wire-payins/bank-wire-payin-object.md)
- [Create a Bank Wire PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-wire-payins/create-bank-wire-payin.md)
- [View a PayIn (Bank Wire)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bank-wire-payins/view-payin-bank-wire.md)
- [The Banking Alias object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/banking-aliases/banking-alias-object.md)
- [Create an IBAN Banking Alias](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/banking-aliases/create-iban-banking-alias.md)
- [Deactivate a Banking Alias](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/banking-aliases/deactivate-banking-alias.md)
- [View a Banking Alias](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/banking-aliases/view-banking-alias.md)
- [View a Banking Alias for a Wallet](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/banking-aliases/view-banking-alias-wallet.md)
- [The Bizum PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bizum/bizum-payin-object.md)
- [Create a Bizum PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bizum/create-bizum-payin.md)
- [View a PayIn (Bizum)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/bizum/view-payin-bizum.md)
- [The BLIK PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/blik/blik-payin-object.md)
- [Create a BLIK PayIn (with code)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/blik/create-blik-payin-with-code.md)
- [Create a BLIK PayIn (without code)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/blik/create-blik-payin-without-code.md)
- [View a PayIn (BLIK)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/blik/view-payin-blik.md)
- [The Card Registration object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/card-registrations/card-registration-object.md): Register card details to obtain a `CardId` token for one-time, recurring, or preauthorized card payments
- [Create a Card Registration](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/card-registrations/create-card-registration.md)
- [Tokenize the card](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/card-registrations/tokenize-card.md)
- [Update a Card Registration](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/card-registrations/update-card-registration.md)
- [View a Card Registration](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/card-registrations/view-card-registration.md)
- [The Card Validation object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/card-validations/card-validation-object.md)
- [Create a Card Validation](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/card-validations/create-card-validation.md)
- [View a Card Validation](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/card-validations/view-card-validation.md)
- [The Card object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/cards/card-object.md)
- [Deactivate or edit a Card](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/cards/deactivate-edit-card.md)
- [List Cards for a Fingerprint](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/cards/list-cards-fingerprint.md)
- [List Cards for a User](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/cards/list-cards-user.md)
- [View a Card](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/cards/view-card.md)
- [The Client Wallet object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/client-wallets/client-wallet-object.md)
- [List all Client Wallets](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/client-wallets/list-client-wallets.md)
- [List Client Wallets by FundsType](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/client-wallets/list-client-wallets-fundstype.md)
- [View a Client Wallet](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/client-wallets/view-client-wallet.md)
- [The Client object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/client/client-object.md)
- [Update a Client](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/client/update-client.md): Modify details about your platform registered with Mangopay
- [Upload a Client logo](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/client/upload-client-logo.md)
- [View a Client](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/client/view-client.md): Retrieve details about your platform registered with Mangopay
- [The Conversion Rate object (FX)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/conversion-rates/conversion-rate-object.md)
- [View an indicative Conversion Rate](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/conversion-rates/view-conversion-rate.md)
- [The Conversion object (FX)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/conversions/conversion-object.md)
- [Create an Instant Conversion between Client Wallets](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/conversions/create-instant-conversion-client-wallets.md)
- [Create an Instant Conversion between user Wallets](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/conversions/create-instant-conversion-user-wallets.md)
- [Create a Quoted Conversion between Client Wallets](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/conversions/create-quoted-conversion-client-wallets.md)
- [Create a Quoted Conversion between user Wallets](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/conversions/create-quoted-conversion-user-wallets.md)
- [View a Conversion](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/conversions/view-conversion.md)
- [The Country Authorizations object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/country-authorizations/country-authorizations-object.md)
- [List Authorizations for all countries](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/country-authorizations/list-authorizations-countries.md)
- [View Authorizations for a country](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/country-authorizations/view-authorizations-country.md)
- [Cancel a Deposit Preauthorization](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/deposit-preauthorizations/cancel-deposit-preauthorization.md)
- [Create a Deposit Preauthorization](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/deposit-preauthorizations/create-deposit-preauthorization.md)
- [Create a Deposit Preauthorized PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/deposit-preauthorizations/create-deposit-preauthorized-payin.md)
- [The Deposit Preauthorization object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/deposit-preauthorizations/deposit-preauthorization-object.md)
- [The Deposit Preauthorized PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/deposit-preauthorizations/deposit-preauthorized-payin-object.md)
- [List Deposit Preauthorizations for a Card](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/deposit-preauthorizations/list-deposit-preauthorizations-card.md)
- [List Deposit Preauthorizations for a User](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/deposit-preauthorizations/list-deposit-preauthorizations-user.md)
- [View a Deposit Preauthorization (Card, PayPal)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/deposit-preauthorizations/view-deposit-preauthorization.md)
- [View a PayIn (Deposit Preauthorized Card)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/deposit-preauthorizations/view-payin-deposit-preauthorized.md)
- [Create a Direct Card PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/direct-card-payins/create-direct-card-payin.md): Process a one-time payment with a `CardId`, obtained from the card registration process
- [The Direct Card PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/direct-card-payins/direct-card-payin-object.md): One-time payment using a tokenized card
- [View a PayIn (Direct Card)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/direct-card-payins/view-payin-direct-card.md)
- [Create a Direct Debit PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/direct-debit-payins/create-direct-debit-payin.md)
- [The Direct Debit PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/direct-debit-payins/direct-debit-payin-object.md)
- [View a PayIn (Direct Debit)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/direct-debit-payins/view-payin-direct-debit.md)
- [Create a Dispute Document](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-documents/create-dispute-document.md)
- [Create a Dispute Document Page](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-documents/create-dispute-document-page.md)
- [Create a weblink to view the Pages of a Dispute Document](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-documents/create-weblink-to-view-dispute-document-pages.md)
- [The Dispute Document object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-documents/dispute-document-object.md)
- [List all Dispute Documents](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-documents/list-dispute-documents.md)
- [List Documents for a Dispute](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-documents/list-documents-dispute.md)
- [Submit a Dispute Document](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-documents/submit-dispute-document.md)
- [View a Dispute Document](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-documents/view-dispute-document.md)
- [Create a Bank Wire PayIn to the Repudiation Wallet](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-settlement/create-bank-wire-payin-to-repudiation-wallet.md)
- [Create a Settlement Transfer](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-settlement/create-settlement-transfer.md)
- [The Settlement Transfer object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-settlement/settlement-transfer-object.md)
- [View a Settlement Transfer](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/dispute-settlement/view-settlement-transfer.md)
- [Close a Dispute](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/close-dispute.md)
- [The Dispute object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/dispute-object.md)
- [List all Disputes](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/list-disputes.md)
- [List Disputes for a PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/list-disputes-payin.md)
- [List Disputes pending settlement](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/list-disputes-settlement.md)
- [List Disputes for a User](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/list-disputes-user.md)
- [List Disputes for a Wallet](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/list-disputes-wallet.md)
- [Submit a Dispute](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/submit-dispute.md)
- [Update a Dispute](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/update-dispute.md)
- [View a Dispute](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/disputes/view-dispute.md)

- [Supported providers](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/echo/supported-providers.md)
- [The Event object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/events/event-object.md)
- [List all Events](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/events/list-events.md)
- [[Deprecated] Create a Giropay PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/giropay/create-giropay-payin.md)
- [[Deprecated] The Giropay PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/giropay/giropay-payin-object.md)
- [View a PayIn (Giropay)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/giropay/view-payin-giropay.md)
- [Create a Google Pay PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/google-pay/create-google-pay-payin.md)
- [The Google Pay PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/google-pay/google-pay-payin-object.md)
- [View a PayIn (Google Pay)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/google-pay/view-payin-google-pay.md)
- [Create an iDEAL PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/ideal/create-ideal-payin.md)
- [[Deprecated] Create a Web Card PayIn (iDEAL)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/ideal/create-web-card-payin-ideal.md)
- [The iDEAL PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/ideal/ideal-payin-object.md)
- [View a PayIn (iDEAL)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/ideal/view-payin-ideal.md)
- [Create an IDV Session](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/idv-sessions/create-idv-session.md): Initiate a hosted KYC/KYB session and obtain a unique URL for the hosted fronted experience
- [The IDV Session object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/idv-sessions/idv-session-object.md): Container for Mangopay's hosted KYC/KYB solution
- [List IDV Sessions for a User](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/idv-sessions/list-idv-sessions-user.md): Retrieve key details of all hosted KYC/KYC sessions attempted for a user
- [View an IDV Session](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/idv-sessions/view-idv-session.md): See details of a hosted KYC/KYB session, outcome of checks, and verified data
- [Cancel an Intent](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/cancel-intent.md): Cancel all or part of an authorized Intent
- [Create an Intent](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/create-intent.md): Declare a transaction authorization processed by a third-party PSP
- [Create an Intent Capture](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/create-intent-capture.md): Declare the full or partial capture of an authorization processed by a third-party PSP
- [Create an Intent Dispute](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/create-intent-dispute.md): Declare the full or partial dispute of a payment processed by a third-party PSP
- [Create an Intent Refund](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/create-intent-refund.md): Declare the full or partial refund of a payment processed by a third-party PSP
- [Create an Intent Split](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/create-intent-split.md): Create a transfer to the wallet of the seller of an Intent line item.
- [Execute an Intent Split](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/execute-intent-split.md): Release the funds of a Split to the wallet of the seller of the Intent line item.
- [The Intent object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/intent-object.md)
- [Reverse an Intent Refund](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/reverse-intent-refund.md): Declare the reversal of a refund processed by a third-party PSP
- [Reverse an Intent Split](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/reverse-intent-split.md): Cancel an unexecuted Split
- [Update an Intent Dispute](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/update-intent-dispute.md): Track the outcome of a dispute processed by a third-party PSP
- [Update an Intent Split](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/update-intent-split.md): Modify a Split before execution.
- [View an Intent](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/view-intent.md): Retrieve the declaration of a transaction processed by a third-party PSP
- [View an Intent Split](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/intents/view-intent-split.md): Retrieve details of a Split of an Intent.
- [Create a Klarna PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/klarna/create-klarna-payin.md)
- [The Klarna PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/klarna/klarna-payin-object.md)
- [View a PayIn (Klarna)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/klarna/view-payin-klarna.md)
- [Create a KYC Document](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/kyc-documents/create-kyc-document.md): Create a container for files to be submitted
- [Create a KYC Document Page](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/kyc-documents/create-kyc-document-page.md): Upload a file to the KYC Document object
- [The KYC Document object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/kyc-documents/kyc-document-object.md)
- [List all KYC Documents](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/kyc-documents/list-kyc-documents.md)
- [List KYC Documents for a User](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/kyc-documents/list-kyc-documents-user.md)
- [Submit a KYC Document](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/kyc-documents/submit-kyc-document.md)
- [View a KYC Document](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/kyc-documents/view-kyc-document.md)
- [Cancel a Mandate](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mandates/cancel-mandate.md)
- [Create a Mandate](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mandates/create-mandate.md)
- [List all Mandates](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mandates/list-mandates.md)
- [List Mandates for a Bank Account](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mandates/list-mandates-bank-account.md)
- [List Mandates for a User](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mandates/list-mandates-user.md)
- [The Mandate object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mandates/mandate-object.md)
- [View a Mandate](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mandates/view-mandate.md)
- [Create an MB WAY PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mb-way/create-mb-way-payin.md)
- [The MB WAY PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mb-way/mb-way-payin-object.md)
- [View a PayIn (MB WAY)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/mb-way/view-payin-mb-way.md)
- [Create an Multibanco PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/multibanco/create-multibanco-payin.md)
- [The Multibanco PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/multibanco/multibanco-payin-object.md)
- [View a PayIn (Multibanco)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/multibanco/view-payin-multibanco.md)
- [Managing API keys](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/api-keys.md)
- [Permission scopes](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/api-keys/scopes.md)
- [Authentication](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/authentication.md)
- [Create an access token for Checkout SDK features](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/authentication/create-access-token-checkout.md): Generate an access token to initialize the Checkout SDK to provide PayPal One-Click
- [Create an access token for the Recipients embedded experience](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/authentication/create-access-token-recipient.md): Generate an access token to run the Recipients embedded experience using Mangopay Elements
- [Create OAuth bearer token](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/authentication/create-oauth-token.md): Generate an OAuth bearer token to authenticate your API calls
- [Data availability periods](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/data-availability-periods.md)
- [Data formats](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/data-formats.md)
- [Filtering and sorting](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/filtering-sorting.md)
- [Idempotency](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/idempotency.md)
- [Introduction](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/introduction.md)
- [Pagination](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/pagination.md)
- [Rate limiting](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/overview/rate-limiting.md)
- [Create a Pay by Bank PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/pay-by-bank/create-pay-by-bank-payin.md)
- [The Pay by Bank PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/pay-by-bank/pay-by-bank-payin-object.md)
- [View a PayIn (Pay by Bank)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/pay-by-bank/view-payin-pay-by-bank.md)
- [View supported banks for Pay by Bank](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/pay-by-bank/view-supported-banks-pay-by-bank.md): Retrieve supported banks to present to a user for Pay by Bank pay-ins
- [Create a Payconiq PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/payconiq/create-payconiq-payin.md)

- [The Payment Method Metadata object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/payment-method-metadata/payment-method-metadata-object.md)

- [View a Payout](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/payouts/view-payout.md)
- [View a Payout and check mode applied](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/payouts/view-payout-check-mode-applied.md)
- [Add tracking information to a PayPal PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/paypal/add-tracking-paypal-payin.md)

- [Create a PayPal Preauthorization](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/paypal/create-paypal-preauthorization.md)
- [Create a Recurring PayPal PayIn (CIT)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/paypal/create-recurring-paypal-payin-cit.md)
- [Create a Recurring PayPal PayIn (MIT)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/paypal/create-recurring-paypal-payin-mit.md)
- [The PayPal PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/paypal/paypal-payin-object.md)
- [The Recurring PayPal PayIn object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/paypal/recurring-paypal-payin-object.md)
- [Submit data for a PayPal PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/paypal/submit-data-paypal-payin.md): Provide transaction data to PayPal prior to initiating a pay-in
- [View data submitted for a PayPal PayIn](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/paypal/view-data-paypal-payin.md): Retrieve pre-transaction data submitted previously
- [View a PayIn (PayPal)](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/paypal/view-payin-paypal.md)

- [Deactivate a Recipient](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/recipients/deactivate-recipient.md): Permanently disable a Recipient

- [The Recipient object](https://docs.mangopay.com/api-reference/recipients/recipient-object.md)

- [Proxy management](https://docs.mangopay.com/guides/sca/proxy-management.md): Managing user consent to the proxy allowing you to take action on their behalf

- [SCA session redirection](https://docs.mangopay.com/guides/sca/session.md): Learn how to redirect a user for their hosted SCA session

- [SCA on users](https://docs.mangopay.com/guides/sca/users.md): Read about how SCA impacts user endpoints
